description: Translator ground-truth — Sprint 2026-05-11. 10 non-English samples (2 PL, 2 CZ, 2 UA, 2 RO, 1 IT, 1 FR). GT is curator-validated English (the existing title_en was a Haiku starting point; the GT here is the version the curator considers correct). Scoring uses normalised token-overlap with semantic core terms — exact wording differences (e.g. 'cargo' vs 'transport') do not penalise as long as the procurement subject is preserved.

samples.label: PL-MOD-TransportTrailers

input.title: Poland – Trailers and semi-trailers – DOSTAWA PRZYCZEP TRANSPORTOWYCH DUŻEJ, ŚREDNIEJ I MAŁEJ ŁADOWNOŚCI
input.description: Supply of transport trailers across three capacity categories for the Polish armed forces. The procurement covers high-capacity, medium-capacity and small-capacity transport trailers, all under defence directive.

samples.ground_truth_title_en: Supply of high, medium and small capacity transport trailers

input.title: Poland – General-purpose trailers – DOSTAWA PRZYCZEP TRANSPORTOWYCH DUŻEJ ŁADOWNOŚCI
input.description: Supply of high-capacity transport trailers in a base quantity of 4 units, with an option to procure up to a maximum of 8 units. Buyer: 12 WOJSKOWY ODDZIAŁ GOSPODARCZY (Polish Armed Forces military procurement unit).

samples.label: CZ-VOPCZ-LowBedSemi

input.title: Czechia – Semi-trailers – Pořízení podvalníku pro přepravy těžké vojenské techniky
input.description: Acquisition of a low-bed semi-trailer (podvalník) designed for the transport of heavy military equipment. Buyer: VOP CZ, s.p. (Czech state defence enterprise).

samples.ground_truth_title_en: Acquisition of low-bed semi-trailer for heavy military equipment transport

input.title: Czechia – Trailers – Polní kuchyně - přívěsný vozík - nákup
input.description: Procurement of modular field kitchen trailers PK-4ARMY mounted on single-axle off-road chassis.

input.title: Причіп автомобільний
input.description: Ukraine is seeking to procure 16 car trailers. The delivery period indicated in the tender is approximate, accounting for all procedural timelines.

input.title: Причіп платформа для перевезення автомобілв
input.description: Ukraine is procuring 4 trailer platforms designed for the transportation of automobiles. The trailers are intended to support vehicle logistics and transport operations.

input.title: Romania – Trailers – Acord cadru de furnizare "Remorci frigorifice"
input.description: Framework agreement for the supply of refrigerated trailers (Remorci frigorifice) to the Romanian Armed Forces.

samples.label: RO-FieldKitchen

input.title: Romania – Field kitchens – Achizitia de ansamblu bucatarie(containere si cort)
input.description: Procurement of complete kitchen assembly comprising containers and tent for Romanian Armed Forces.

samples.ground_truth_title_en: Procurement of kitchen assembly (containers and tent)

samples.label: IT-MultifunctionalEquipment

input.title: Italy – Mobile units on trailers – FORNITURA DI ATTREZZATURE MULTIFUNZIONALI DEL GENIO E TORRI FARO BIASSALI SU RIMORCHIO
input.description: Supply of multifunctional engineer equipment and field lighting towers on two-axle trailers for the Italian Army.

samples.ground_truth_title_en: Supply of multifunctional engineer equipment and field lighting towers on trailers

samples.label: FR-MotorcyclesTrailers

input.title: France – Motorcycles – Acquisition de motos tout terrain militarisées et de remorques
input.description: Acquisition of militarised off-road motorcycles and trailers in 4 lots for the French Army (MINARM/TERRE/SIMMT/DDC).

samples.ground_truth_title_en: Acquisition of militarised off-road motorcycles and trailers
